items.title: Met Eireann picks up potential gamechanger as Scandinavia threat looms
items.summary: While high pressure continues as the primary system affecting conditions nationwide, meteorologists are monitoring a zone of low pressure forming near Scandinavia, which may play a significant part in determining Ireland's weather as August draws near.

items.title: Clairo Shares “Losing Pride” Demo To Benefit Climate Justice
items.summary: Clairo hasn't released new music since her critically acclaimed 2024 LP Charm, but she's stayed busy. She's collaborated with Daniel Caesar, Smerz, Rostam, Ryan Beatty, and more; she's signed to Atlantic Records; and she's offered updates on her forthcoming fourth album.
